source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An isolated conducting sphere is charged. Fig. 5.1 shows the variation of the potential $V$ due to the sphere with displacement $x$ from its centre. Use Fig. 5.1 to determine: the radius of the sphere
extraction_notes: 题目明确要求使用 Fig. 5.1 作答，且记录中 vision_relevance 为 essential
图片字段提供的是 PIL 对象字符串表示，不是实际文件路径或 URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains PIL object string representations rather than actual file paths or URLs

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'Fig. 5.1 shows' and 'Use Fig. 5.1', so the figure is required to answer
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the core information is not fully recoverable from text alone
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows an existing image, and metadata.image_quality_summaries reports high readability_score=0.9439
multi_step: the task requires identifying the relevant feature on the V-versus-x graph and mapping it to the sphere radius, which is more than pure lookup
the answer is a single numeric radius, so the reasoning chain appears short rather than deeply compositional
question_text is concise and does not introduce multiple independent conditions or extended calculations
verifiability: answer_type is short_text and answer_text gives a concrete numeric value with units: 0.060 m
the target quantity is well-defined (radius of the sphere), so a downstream checker can compare against an expected numeric answer with tolerance
asset_registry_record shows question_present=true, answer_present=true, and registry_passed=true

risk_flags: graph-based read-off may allow small tolerance or ambiguity in the exact numeric value
metadata.image_paths contains PIL object string representations rather than actual file paths or URLs

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像都存在，核心语义资产完整
图像虽为解题关键，但现有记录显示图片可用且可读性较高
答案是明确的短文本数值结果，整体可验证性较强
当前风险主要是元数据图片路径记录异常和图上读数可能存在小幅容差，不足以削弱候选池价值
